jsonLd.title: Cello is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Cello are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cello:
Cello is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
